subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the truth! Give thanks unto God, for the breeze of His favors hath wafted and the light of guidance hath shone forth, and the chamber [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون حقیقت شکر کن خدا را که نسیم عنایت وزید و نور هدایت درخشید و سراچه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @effort; striving, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude
